## Security boundary

Do not report security vulnerabilities here.

Do not include:
- secrets
- tokens
- private keys
- exploit steps
- credential material
- live target details

For security issues, use `SECURITY.md`.

## Bug summary

## Expected behavior

## Actual behavior

## Affected version or tag

## Reproduction steps

Use local-only, non-sensitive reproduction steps.

## Logs or evidence

Attach redacted logs only.
